race_meta.race_name: Bet Smarter With Oddschecker Conditional Jockeys' Handicap Hurdle

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner newtown rambler (ire) was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was So You Know with 26.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was So You Know > Ukantango, but actual result was Newtown Rambler (IRE) > So You Know (IRE). Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
